text: Query and aggregate actual transactions consistently by account, date range, spend category, transfer state, refund state, relationship state, and categorization state. Evidence: direct — the owner requires daily spend tracking and later budget analytics; workflows UC-LEDGER-005, UC-LEDGER-010, and UC-LEDGER-011.
target: Equivalent filters over unchanged active transactions/relationships select the same membership; paginated results remain bound to the first-page snapshot; exact totals reconcile to that set and are consumable by BUDGET and INSIGHTS without duplicated finance logic.
